signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 y GPT-5.5 Pro elevando el techo de inteligencia y eficiencia en su API.
NVIDIA presenta Rubin y vaticina una reconfiguración económica de la computación de 10 billones de dólares.
Google despliega la serie Gemini 3.1 optimizada para latencia, coste y control granular de voz (TTS).
Decoupled DiLoCo permite entrenamiento de modelos masivos en infraestructuras distribuidas y resilientes.
La contabilidad de carbono se consolida como requisito obligatorio de adquisición en la industria de chips.
risks: Mercados de agentes autónomos operando con marcos legales y políticas de seguridad insuficientes.
Dependencia crítica de la ejecución de nuevas fábricas de semiconductores frente a la retórica de inversión.
Cuellos de botella en la sostenibilidad ambiental debido a la escala energética demandada por el hardware.
watch: Rendimiento de GPT-5.5 Pro en entornos críticos de salud y precisión clínica.
Adopción de la arquitectura Rubin de NVIDIA frente a soluciones de silicio personalizadas.
Estandarización de métricas AGI a través del nuevo marco cognitivo de DeepMind.

items.title: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs 13h GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings h...
items.summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs 13h GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries. x.com/16338749515087… Today we’re introducing two big steps for health at OpenAI: - ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT designed for clinical work - HealthBench Professional, a new benchmark to evaluate real clinician chat tasks We’re excited about what this can unlock for care. ![Image 5: ❤️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2764.svg)
items.why: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.5 Pro y versiones especializadas para medicina; marca el nuevo estado del arte en razonamiento y eficiencia.

items.title: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that...
items.summary: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges. Read more on Gemini Embedding 2 is now generally available in the Gemini API and Vertex AI! Start building with our first natively multimodal embedding model, now equipped with the stability and optimizations required for production apps.
items.why: Gemini Embedding 2 facilita búsquedas multimodales nativas y estables para aplicaciones de producción a gran escala.

items.title: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants di...
items.summary: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong. Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.
items.why: Investigación sobre mercados de agentes destaca la necesidad urgente de marcos legales para evitar fallos de alineación.

items.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training
items.why: La técnica Decoupled DiLoCo permite entrenar modelos en clústeres geográficamente dispersos con alta resiliencia.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS introduce etiquetas de audio granulares para un control preciso de la expresividad en voz sintética.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.why: Propuesta de un marco formal para medir el progreso hacia AGI, buscando estandarizar la evaluación de capacidades.

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Woman working with a large tool. On the left are the Google and MIT FutureTech logos, "AI for the Economy Forum", and "Innovation and Adaption in the New Era"
items.why: Iniciativa de Google y MIT para analizar el impacto de la IA en la productividad y la adaptación de la fuerza laboral.

items.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform, Open Models, Autonomous Driving: NVIDIA Presents Blueprint for the Future at CES
items.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the Fontainebleau Las Vegas to open CES 2026, declaring that AI is scaling into every domain and every device. “Computing has been fundamentally reshaped as a result of accelerated computing, as a result of artificial intelligence,” Huang said. “What that means is some $10 trillion […]
items.why: La plataforma Rubin de NVIDIA es el pilar de la próxima generación de hardware para la economía de IA de 10 billones.

items.title: SemiWiki Acquires IPnest!
items.summary: After more than 15 years of collaboration with Dr. Eric Esteve and IPnest, SemiWiki has acquired the famed IP reports with Eric Esteve staying on through 2026 to ease the transition. Not only will SemiWiki provide the industry standard Interface IP and Design IP reports, SemiWiki will be expanding the depth and breadth of the coverage.… Read More The post SemiWiki Acquires IPnest! appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Adquisición de IPnest por SemiWiki consolida el análisis de propiedad intelectual en el sector de semiconductores.

items.title: Elon Musk Needs to Put His Fab Money Where his Mouth is!
items.summary: To me this is going to be one of the bigger Chicken Little moments in the history of semiconductors. Mostly because we are now a click driven society and the media is plagued by so called influencers that live and die by clicks. In my 40+ years as a semiconductor professional I have witnessed many of these Chicken Little moments with … Read More The post Elon Musk Needs to Put His Fab Money Where his Mouth is! appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Análisis crítico sobre la necesidad de capital real en plantas de fabricación frente a la influencia mediática.

items.title: Carbon in the Age of AI Chips: What the Semiconductor Industry Needs to Know This Earth Day
items.summary: Stephen Russell: Senior Technical Fellow, TechInsights Every April, Earth Day prompts a flurry of corporate sustainability pledges and green-tinted press releases. But for the semiconductor industry in 2026, the conversation has moved well past pledges. Carbon accountability is now a procurement requirement, a regulatory… Read More The post Carbon in the Age of AI Chips: What the Semiconductor Industry Needs to Know This Earth Day appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La huella de carbono se convierte en un factor decisivo de compra y cumplimiento normativo para fabricantes de chips.

items.title: From 8 hours to 80 seconds - NVIDIA’s DGX SuperPOD delivers ready-to-run infrastructure out of the box with leading performance in [#MLPerf](https://x.com/ha...
items.summary: From 8 hours to 80 seconds - NVIDIA’s DGX SuperPOD delivers ready-to-run infrastructure out of the box with leading performance in [#MLPerf](https://x.com/hashtag/MLPerf?src=hashtag_click). Learn more: [nvda.ws/2XDFqw3](https://t.co/QpwC8Dj9Iy)
items.why: Récords de velocidad en entrenamiento demuestran la superioridad de los sistemas integrados frente a soluciones DIY.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live reduce drásticamente la latencia para interacciones de voz humanas más naturales.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite optimiza el equilibrio entre inteligencia y coste operativo para despliegues masivos.

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.why: Integración de herramientas de IA directamente en el navegador simplifica la automatización de tareas diarias para el usuario.
